name: Smart Sand, Inc.
business: Smart Sand, Inc. is a fully integrated frac and industrial sand supply and services company offering complete mine to wellsite proppant supply and logistics solutions to frac sand customers. It produces low-cost, high quality Northern White sand used as a proppant in hydraulic fracturing and for industrial applications. The company also offers proppant logistics solutions through in-basin transloading terminals and SmartSystems wellsite proppant storage capabilities.
sellsTo: oil and natural gas exploration and production companies

exposures.sentence: In addition, demand may increase over the next five years as growth in liquified natural gas ( LNG ) export capacity and rising power generation requirements, particularly from artificial intelligence data centers, drive increased drilling and completion activity in natural gas basins.
We are a fully integrated frac and industrial sand supply and services company.

We produce low-cost, high quality Northern White sand, which is a premium sand used as a proppant to enhance hydrocarbon recovery rates in the hydraulic fracturing of oil and natural gas wells and for a variety of industrial applications.

catalysts.event: Expansion of Dennison, Ohio terminal completed
catalysts.sentence: We completed an expansion of this terminal in the third quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: New share repurchase program approved by board
catalysts.sentence: On February 23, 2026, our board of directors approved a share repurchase program authorizing us to repurchase up to $20.0 million of its outstanding shares of common stock.

We expect 2026 capital expenditures to be between $15.0 million and $20.0 million, consisting primarily of capital for efficiency projects at our mine and processing facilities and our in-basin terminals, along with investments in our facilities to support incremental IPS activity.

tamClaims.claim: North America proppant demand decreased approximately 2% in 2025 compared to 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Spears and Associates, Inc. ( Spears ), North America proppant demand decreased by approximately 2% compared to 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Frac sand demand is expected to increase moderately in 2026.
tamClaims.sentence: Frac sand demand is expected to increase moderately in 2026.
